title: Joint Probability Distribution for Two Discrete Random Variables
description: A visual representation of a joint probability mass function (PMF) for two discrete random variables, X and Y, showing all possible outcome pairs and their associated probabilities.
elements: Random Variable X (possible outcomes: x1, x2, ..., xn)
Random Variable Y (possible outcomes: y1, y2, ..., ym)
relationships: X and Y are defined on the same sample space
The probability value P(X=x_i, Y=y_j) is assigned to each unique pair of outcomes (x_i, y_j)
The sum of all probabilities in the joint distribution equals 1
